title: WHO?
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: California's homeless population has increased nearly 40% in the past 6 years.
California has spent over $22 billion on the homelessness crisis.
California's homelessness crisis has become a public health and safety crisis.
The bipartisan Senate Bill 1011 aims to take the City of San Diego’s 'Unsafe Camping Ordinance' statewide.
Senate Bill 1011 will help compassionately clear encampments and connect homeless individuals to necessary services.
